pages.title: Verifying Chunks Are Unloaded
pages.text: $(li)Enter CACHED mode $(li)Press F3 (debug screen) $(li)Check "C:" value (chunks loaded) $(li)Value should be lower than during SIMULATING$(br2)$(bold)Example$(): $(li)SIMULATING: C: 441/256 (CM chunks loaded) $(li)CACHED: C: 305/256 (CM chunks unloaded)
